wiki.summary: “gynecologist” was first previewed via Ken’s alternate Instagram account on January 27, 2026. The track later appeared on a promotional USB drive hidden in Atlanta on June 26, 2026, as part of a scavenger hunt for xperiment, alongside “wheredoistart” and “drug kit.” Ken has a running joke about the profession. In an interview, he said that if he weren’t making music, he would be a gynecologist. On his track “Money Spread,” he raps: Read more on Last.fm.
